creator: kenji@k2r.org
text:
archives/p5-Compress-Raw-Bzip2 fail to install at staging, with the error of non-existing Bzip2.bs

Fix: removing the Bzip2.bs from the pkg-plist will solve this problem. Patch attached.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/archivers/p5-Compress-Raw-Bzip2
